name: Weighted Pull-Up
cues: Pronated grip just outside shoulders; full hang to chin clear of bar; control the eccentric.

name: Weighted Dip
cues: Slight forward lean; elbows track ~45°; shoulders below elbows at bottom; lock out without shrugging.

name: Weighted Muscle-Up
cues: False grip or deep pull; explode into transition; keep rings/bar close; lock out dips fully.

name: Back Squat
cues: Brace hard; hips back and down; crease below parallel; mid-foot pressure; drive knees out.

name: Chin-Up
cues: Supinated grip; pull elbows to ribs; avoid swinging; pause briefly at the top.

name: Neutral-Grip Pull-Up
cues: Palms facing; easier on elbows/wrists; full hang to chest toward bar.

name: Australian Row / Inverted Row
cues: Body rigid; pull chest to bar; squeeze scapulae; feet farther = harder.

name: Barbell Row
cues: Hinge ~45°; pull to lower ribs; no bounce; keep lumbar neutral.

name: Face Pull
cues: Pull to face/ears; externally rotate at finish; light–moderate load, clean form.

name: Dead Hang
cues: Active hang: slight scap depression; relax neck; build time under tension for elbow health.

name: Scapular Pull-Up
cues: Arms straight; depress and retract scapulae only; pause at top; no elbow bend.

name: Ring Dip
cues: Rings turn out at top; control instability; full ROM; stop if shoulders pinch.

name: Front Squat
cues: Elbows high; torso upright; full depth; breathe and brace before each rep.

name: Romanian Deadlift
cues: Soft knees; hinge until hamstring stretch; bar close to legs; neutral spine.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
cues: Posterior pelvic tilt; raise legs without swing; control the lower.

name: Band Curl
cues: Elbows pinned; full stretch to squeeze; use for pump and elbow-friendly volume.

name: Band Tricep Extension
cues: Lock elbows in place; extend fully; light bands for high-rep tendon care.

name: Pike Push-Up
cues: Hips high; head toward floor between hands; deepen ROM before adding load.

name: Overhead Press
cues: Brace glutes/core; bar path close to face; lock out overhead without excessive lean.

name: Push-Up
cues: Body straight; chest to floor; elbows ~45°; full lockout without sagging hips.
